issues.description: Missing action: 'trash 2 cards from your hand' is not represented. The DSL only includes DrawCard but omits the required ForceDiscard action.
Incorrect condition type. '[DON!! x1]' should be represented as HasAttachedDon (don attached to this card), not HasRestingDon (resting don in your resource area).

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [When Attacking] Draw 2 cards and trash 2 cards from your hand.
